name: Arxiv Digest v10 - Claude API
description: Automated daily arXiv paper digest with SPECTER2 semantic ranking and Claude AI summaries. After importing: (1) Create SMTP, Google Sheets OAuth2, and Anthropic API credentials in n8n, (2) Update the Read Subscribers node with your Google Sheet ID, (3) Update email nodes with your sender/recipient addresses, (4) Activate the workflow.

parameters.subject: Research Digest FAILED - Flask Container Not Ready
parameters.html:
={{ '

Workflow Failed

Flask Scraper Container Not Available

The flask-scraper Docker container is not responding on port 5680.

Troubleshooting:

  1. Check container exists: docker ps -a --filter name=flask-scraper
  2. Check container logs: docker logs flask-scraper
  3. Rebuild if needed: docker compose build flask-scraper
  4. Check Docker socket mount in n8n container

Attempted at: ' + new Date().toLocaleString() + '

' }}

parameters.content: Fix the HTML to work in the light mode on outlook

## v9: Docker Flask Auto-Management
- **Start Flask Container**: Calls Docker socket API to start flask-scraper
- **Wait 15s**: Let Flask fully initialize
- **Stop Flask Container**: Shuts down flask-scraper after cleanup

Requires: Docker socket mounted in n8n container
(`/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock` in docker-compose.yml)
